L1 Cache: Active Working State

Next Objectives

#### Harden Terminal Environment:

Ensure all future PowerShell commands in D:\Watchtower\_Ops continue to utilize the

.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1

pathing to maintain local agent-browser dependency integrity.
